# phala_images (Data Source)

Lists available OS images for CVMs, similar to DigitalOcean images.

Use this data source to discover exact image slugs before setting `image` on `phala_app`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "phala_images" "west" {
  region = "US-WEST-1"
}

output "image_slugs" {
  value = data.phala_images.west.images[*].slug
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `region` (String) Optional region filter.

### Read-Only

- `images` (Attributes List) Image catalog. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--images))

<a id="nestedatt--images"></a>
### Nested Schema for `images`

Read-Only:

- `is_dev` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `os_image_hash` (String)
- `regions` (List of String)
- `slug` (String)
- `version` (String)
